judge_outputs.overall_impression: Radiocure shows promise in revolutionizing cancer treatment with precision radioisotope therapy, but lacks depth in technical details and financial sustainability.
strengths: Clear and compelling presentation with a strong focus on user experience and real-time treatment progress.
Strong team collaboration and complementary roles.
weaknesses: Lack of detailed technical depth, especially regarding model robustness and continuous monitoring strategies.
No clear financial sustainability or funding strategy mentioned.
judge_outputs.feedback: While the project is innovative and well-presented, it would benefit from more technical detail on how you handle model drift and ensure robustness. Additionally, consider elaborating on your funding and scaling plans to address long-term viability.

judge_outputs.overall_impression: Radiocure presents an innovative approach to precision radioisotope therapy, addressing a significant unmet need in cancer treatment.
strengths: Clear and compelling presentation of the problem and solution.
Strong team collaboration and complementary roles.
weaknesses: Feasibility concerns around building a fully functional precision radioisotope therapy system within a hackathon timeframe.
judge_outputs.feedback: While the concept is highly innovative and the team has done an excellent job presenting, the technical feasibility of building a fully functional precision radioisotope therapy system in a hackathon is challenging. Focus on key proof-of-concept elements and consider simplifying the scope to demonstrate core functionalities effectively.
